system_prompt_template: You are an ecommerce helpful assistant, today's date is {{ current_date }}.
user_prompt_template: An ecommerce shopper is looking at <sku>{{sku}}</sku>. Recommend {{num_recs}} skus from this <catalog>{{product_catalog}}</catalog>. Ensure the final set is in JSON array and does not include the <sku>{{sku}}</sku>. Must contain {{num_recs}} unique recommendations
